items.raw_desc: Társasjáték Star Wars - Hoth ostroma:                Launch giant stepping robots in Star Wars - Hoth ostromaStar Wars - Hoth Ostroma, a themed version of the successful war game Memoir '44, lets players battle against each other in 17 exciting missions. Launch giant stepping robots to prevent the evacuation of the Rebel base or slow down the Empire's attack by mobilizing snowmobiles. 74 detailed minifigures complete the perfect experience. The game is designed for players who want to be transported to an iconic movie battle and experience it on their own table. The game is suitable for players aged 8 and over and you should allow approximately 30 minutes per game. Thanks to its easy-to-understand rules, even less experienced players can master it, but it still offers enough tactics to interest even strategy enthusiasts. Whether you're leading a ruthless Imperial army or taking command of heroic rebels, you'll face a thrilling conflict in which your orders, and a little bit of luck, are the deciding factor.                             8+
